Perplexity is now integrated into Samsung Galaxy S26 phones at a deep level, powering search and reasoning for both the Perplexity assistant and Samsung's Bixby.
Perplexity preloaded with "Hey Plex": The Perplexity app will come preloaded on every Galaxy S26 — making Perplexity the first non-Google company to receive OS-level access on a Samsung device.
Bixby now uses Perplexity for real-time web search and advanced reasoning — delivering accurate, up-to-date answers grounded in the latest information.
Voice mode now runs on OpenAI's GPT Reatime 1.5 model, with over 25% more reliable interactions and dramatically improved voice expressiveness.

Access to advanced AI models (o3‑pro, Opus 4.5 Thinking)"},{"url":"https://www.datastudios.org/post/perplexity-ai-available-models-all-supported-models-version-differences-capabilities-comparison","title":"Perplexity AI Available Models: All Supported Models, Version Differences, Capabilities Comparison, And Access Requirements","content":"Perplexity AI delivers a diverse model ecosystem for both consumer users and developers, combining an in-app model selector with an API-exclusive Sonar family.
The highest Max plan additionally unlocks Claude 4.5 Opus, a model reserved for demanding reasoning and agentic use cases.
The API context lengths are substantial: Sonar and Sonar Reasoning Pro support 128,000 tokens, Sonar Pro extends to 200,000 tokens, and all models feature strict separation from customer data for privacy.
App access to advanced models and features is governed by subscription plans.
For enterprise users, data handling policies change: Enterprise plans default to AI data retention off and do not include customer data in model training, while API model documentation highlights a “No training on customer data” promise across the Sonar family.
Subscription level, platform, and use case determine which models and features are available, ensuring flexibility for research, retrieval, and reasoning tasks at scale."},{"url":"https://mysummit.school/blog/en/perplexity-ai-review-2026/","title":"Perplexity AI in 2026: A Manager's Guide to the Smart Answer Engine | mysummit.school - AI for Managers Blog","content":"Mar 3, 2026 — The top models – Claude Opus 4.8 and GPT-5.5 – are on the Max plan; Pro opens up GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Kimi K2.6.Read more
It now runs on top-tier models – including Claude Opus 4.8 for Max subscribers – so the reports have become deeper and more accurate.
Pro Individual ($20/mo): 300+ Pro queries per day, access to GPT-5.4, Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and Kimi K2.6, plus unlimited Research mode.
